mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER(EMAIL, NAME, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD,PROVIDER,ROLE) VALUES (#{email},#{name},#{loginId}, #{password},#{provider},#{role})
mapper.select: SELECT ID,LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE LOGIN_ID=#{loginId}
SELECT LOGIN_ID, NAME, EMAIL,PROVIDER FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE LOGIN_ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_PLUS(MEMBER_ID, AGE, REGION, MAIN_CATEGORY, MARRIAGE) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{age}, #{region}, #{mainCategory}, #{marriage})
mapper.select: SELECT TMP.AGE, TMP.REGION, TMP.REGION, TMP.MEMBER_ID, TMP.MAIN_CATEGORY ,TM.NAME FROM TBL_MEMBER_PLUS TMP RIGHT JOIN TBL_MEMBER TM ON TMP.MEMBER_ID = TM.LOGIN_ID WHERE TM.LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
